title: Urbanony Large Cutlery Drawer Organiser Expandable, 33-57x38cm Utensil Tray with 8 Compartments + Bonus Microfiber Cloth, Kitchen Drawer Divider for Spoons, Forks, Knives, Silverware Storage, Black
features: 🛠️ EXPANDABLE DESIGN: Adjustable width between 13"(33cm)–22.5"(57cm), fits most kitchen drawers. Ideal for organizing utensils, silverware, and kitchen accessories neatly and efficiently.
🍴 8 COMPARTMENTS: Organize knives, forks, spoons, and cooking tools with the spacious sections of our expandable cutlery tray. Say goodbye to messy kitchen drawers!
🚫 NON-SLIP & STURDY: Features an anti-slip base and strong construction, ensuring that your cutlery and utensils stay securely in place even with frequent drawer use.
🧹 BONUS MICROFIBER CLOTH: Includes a soft microfiber cleaning cloth to easily maintain the organiser clean and dust-free. Keep your kitchen hygienic and spotless effortlessly.
🔄 CUSTOM FIT FOR DRAWERS: Expandable and adjustable design provides the perfect fit for deep or wide drawers, making it a flexible solution for every kitchen layout.
💧 DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Built from tough, water-resistant materials. Wipe down with the included microfiber cloth or damp sponge for long-lasting cleanliness.
🏡 SPACE-SAVING KITCHEN STORAGE: Maximize drawer space with our slim yet capacious organiser. Perfect for kitchen, office, dorm, and RV storage needs.
description: Tidy up your kitchen with our Expandable Cutlery Drawer Organiser, designed for both functionality and style. This versatile utensil tray features 8 spacious compartments and adjustable sides that expand from 13"(33cm)–22.5"(57cm), fitting most standard and deep drawers. Made from durable, easy-to-clean materials with a non-slip base, your silverware, cooking utensils, and kitchen tools stay perfectly organised. Bonus Included: Every organiser comes with a soft microfiber cleaning cloth – perfect for keeping your tray dust-free and hygienic at all times! Simply wipe the organiser with the cloth to maintain a fresh and clean drawer. Whether you're organising cutlery at home, office supplies in a work desk, or kitchen accessories in a dorm, this drawer divider offers a practical, space-saving solution. Upgrade your kitchen today with this sleek, expandable organiser – with bonus cleaning cloth included for added value!
